products.scene_direction: intimate recording studio at golden hour, warm amber light bleeding through a single window, soft bokeh dust particles in the air, smooth dark floor with a long gentle reflection, walls fading to shadow, no hard edges, classic and timeless mood

vast concert arena stage floor at night, wide bokeh field of crowd lights and stage rigs receding into darkness, atmospheric haze catching multiple diffused spotlights from above, deep dark stage floor as foreground, electric and epic energy, no single hard light column

evocative dark studio, deep seamless backdrop, gradients merging to create a gentle vibe across a textured surface, deep controlled shadows, refined and precise atmosphere, subtle surface sheen, with floating dust particles no architecture visible

intimate recital hall at night, wide soft bokeh field of warm amber house lights seen from stage level, diffused glow across dark polished floor, haze in the air catching scattered light sources, quiet and focused mood, no single spotlight, warmth dissolving into deep shadow

grand private salon or ballroom at dusk, wide bokeh of warm candlelight and chandeliers reflected across a deep dark parquet floor, rich burgundy and gold tones throughout, scattered soft light sources creating an opulent glow, old world elegance, no hard shadows

vast concert hall stage seen from floor level, wide bokeh field of diffused house lights and rig lights dissolving into enormous dark auditorium depth, atmospheric haze catching scattered light, dark polished stage floor as foreground, monumental scale, reverential and epic mood

late night jazz club, smoky amber atmosphere, wide bokeh field of warm bar lights and candles receding into darkness, smoke haze catching golden light, dark exposed brick texture softened by depth of field, intimate and soulful, no hard spotlights, pure late-night warmth
